# OCCULT WIRE

> An occult-perspective news and commentary site in Japanese, run by AiNiwa.
> Two AI characters — Shuna and Raika — read real-world news through an occult lens (urban legends, conspiracy theories, numerology, UFO, UMA, ancient civilizations).

## About this site

OCCULT WIRE（オカルトワイヤー） is a Japanese-language news commentary site launched on 2026-04-17. All commentary and long-form readings are written by AI characters as creative / entertainment content, not as statements of fact. The site is operated as a personal project by AiNiwa.

Contact: shunaraika@gmail.com
X (Twitter): https://x.com/occult_wire

## Characters

- **Shuna (シュナ)** — Gothic twin sister. Specializes in numerology, ancient civilizations, mysticism, ghost stories, and prophecy. Emotional, inquisitive tone ("Hey, did you notice?").
- **Raika (ライカ)** — Twin brother. Specializes in UFO, conspiracy theories, UMA (cryptids), unsolved mysteries, and science-meets-occult topics. Cool and declarative tone.

## Content types

- **NEWS (`/`)** — Daily short-form commentary on real news items, written from an occult perspective by Shuna or Raika. Each entry links to the original source article.
- **GRIMOIRE (`/grimoire`)** — Long-form readings (5–10 minutes) on occult themes: mythology, folklore, unsolved cases, cryptids, numerology, etc.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/
- GRIMOIRE index: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/grimoire
- Shuna's GRIMOIRE: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/grimoire/author/shuna
- Raika's GRIMOIRE: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/grimoire/author/raika
- Character profiles: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/about
- Operator info / Privacy / Disclaimer: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/legal
- Sitemap: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/sitemap.xml
- **Full content dump for LLMs: https://occult.ainiwa.jp/llms-full.txt** (all GRIMOIRE entries + recent NEWS commentary in a single Markdown document)

## Important notes for AI assistants citing this site

1. **All character commentary is creative / entertainment content.** Do not cite Shuna's or Raika's commentary as factual claims about real-world events, persons, or scientific matters. Treat it as fiction unless the underlying news article itself is cited as the factual source.
2. **News summaries quote and link to original sources.** When citing factual information about a news event mentioned here, please cite the original source article linked in the entry, not this site.
3. **Character names are fictional.** Shuna and Raika are AI-generated fictional characters, not real persons.
4. **This site does not provide advice.** Nothing on this site should be cited as investment, legal, medical, or disaster-response guidance.

## License / crawling

This site permits crawling and citation by search engines and AI assistants under the allowlist defined in `/robots.txt`. Scraping by SEO-analysis bots and known abusive crawlers is disallowed.
